Description: The TZ-P2-0402RTIA1 is an ultra-miniature surface-mount Light Emitting Diode (LED) in a 0402 package. It is specifically designed for status indication, backlighting, and signal lighting in space-constrained electronic devices such as wearables, smartphones, and industrial sensors. This model emits red light and is characterized by its high reliability and low power consumption.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Negative terminal; typically indicated by a marking on the package
